case_title: PETER N. STEINMETZ VS. JED MCCALEB ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-04-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEINMETZ, PETER N. AS TO DEFENDANT MCCALEB, JED CODE COLLECTIVE, LLC, A NEW YORK LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-16-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-23-2019

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Mar-03-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610.
